name: Liko
description: Liko is a protagonist of Pokémon Horizons. She owns a mysterious pendant, which was given to her by her grandmother. Liko is a member of Rising Volt Tacklers and travels with them, so she attends Indigo Academy remotely. She is a kind and polite girl who doesn't do well in stressful situations. Despite her shyness, Liko can easily make friends. ~!Her pendant was revealed to be a Terapagos in hibernation.!~
mediaTitles: Anime Pocket Monsters: Liko to Roy no Bouken
searchTerms: Anime Pocket Monsters: Liko to Roy no Bouken

name: Nephren Ruq Insania
nativeName: ネフレン・ルク・インサニア
description: Nephren is a quiet Leprechaun, who almost never shows her emotions. Despite this, she cares a lot about her friends, and tries to support them as best as she can, especially Willem. Nephren cares a lot for Willem because she thinks he is the same as her. While she was having a conversation with Nygglatho, she described her feeling for Willem as: "I don’t want him to break down. So I’ll try my best to stay by his side and support him." (Source: SukaSuka Wiki)

name: Nice
description: A manifestation of the perfect hero as imagined by the people.

name: Taihei Doma
description: A company employee who lives together with his younger sister Umaru. With his kind and methodical personality, he easily handles his job as well as taking care of all the housework for the two of them. He warmly watches over his carefree sister and scolds her as she spends her time lazying around.

name: Wangnan Ja
description: Ja Wangnan aspires to be the king of the whole Tower. He values his determination in life more than anyone else's desires. He plans to scale up the Tower's Floors and reach the true top of the Tower, unlike those who have given up.

name: Agni
description: Soma's highly-dedicated butler, Agni comes with his master to England in search of Meena. Agni is a master at Indian cooking, and has even shown some skill in landscaping (turning the bushes in the Phantomhive Manor's garden into topiary elephants, for instance). But even more impressive than his cooking skills is his martial arts ability. When he and Soma meet Ciel and Sebastian, Soma orders the butlers to fight. In a move that surprises even Sebastian, Agni proceeds to give the demon a run for

name: Ai Magase
description: Ai Magase is a mysterious yet beautiful woman who manipulates several powerful figures who got involved in the "Shiniki Initiative Conspiracy" by disguising herself as several beautiful women to do her bidding.

name: Binghe Luo
description: Luo Binghe is the protagonist in Proud Immortal Demon Way, and the main lead in Scum Villain's Self-Saving System. He is half Heavenly Demon and half human and was a disciple on Qing Jing peak taught by Shen Qingqiu.

name: Honoka Yukishiro
description: Honoka Yukishiro is the quiet and reserved one, but that does not keep her from having her own friends and following. She can be quite strict and evil when the situation calls for it. Her alter ego is Cure White. Her specialty is the science club, where she is looked up to by the others. Honoka hasn't had many friends, but the few she has seem to be really close to her. It has also been noted that she's relatively popular with the boys, though she seems to have little interest in them. She has a

name: Jack Atlas
description: Jack is known as the "Absolute King of the Riding Duel", and was once Yusei's best friend, but they became bitter rivals after Jack stole Yusei's Stardust Dragon and D-Wheel and left for Neo Domino City. Now, as a former resident of Satellite, he must hide his past from the rest of society. He is very arrogant and overconfident, but still has a strong conscience. His signature card is also a Synchro monster, Red Daemon's Dragon. He plays a "Swarm" Deck, focusing on quickly Tuning weaker monsters

name: Kagura
description: __Height:__ 156 cm Her name comes from Shinto ritual: the kanji for Kagura (神楽) meaning "entertainment of the gods". It was used to describe the traditional music played at shrines and the Imperial Court. Kagura also makes a cameo appearance as an anthropologist in Classroom of Thesis; From the Report to the Graduation Thesis by Kazuhisa Todayama which refers to several other Azumanga Daioh characters. While she makes appearances earlier on as one of Nyamo's students, Kagura doesn't become a tru
mediaTitles: Azumanga Daioh: The Very Short Movie
searchTerms: Azumanga Daioh: The Very Short Movie

name: Latifa
description: Latifa is a young fox beastkin girl born in the Beltram Kingdom of the Strahl region. ~!She also has the past memories and personality of an elementary school student Japanese girl named Endo Suzune.!~

name: Lilisa Suzunomiya
description: Lilisa was formerly from a commoner background. [Her mother](https://anilist.co/character/366741/Yuka-Suzunomiya) remarried Suzunomiya Tadashi, a real estate magnate in Kanto. She hides the fact that she was from a commoner background who liked rock and guitar only a month ago, and pretends to be a first-class lady, becoming the object of envy at school.

name: Makoto Hanaoka
description: A young man who dresses like a woman despite his mother's disapproval.
mediaTitles: Senpai is an Otokonoko Movie: Sunshine After the Rain
searchTerms: Senpai is an Otokonoko Movie: Sunshine After the Rain

name: Meow
description: Contrary to expectations, he's not a genetically advanced cat, but he's actually an alien that lives on the planet, Betelgeuse. Meow is very carefree, as if he were raised with no constraints. At times he can come across as excessively lazy, preferring to play video games and read manga instead of working.

name: Misaki Okusawa
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") Misaki is a member of Hello, Happy World!. Under the "guise" of the mascot character Michelle, she is the DJ and composer of the band; as Misaki, she is the composer and Michelle's "agent". Misaki is a first-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School. She began wearing the bear costume at her part-time job when she was roped into joining the band by her classmate Kokoro. Despite Misaki telling her bandmates multiple times that she and Michelle are the same person,

name: Natsume Hyuuga
description: **Alice**: Fire **Alice Stone Color**: Red **Height**: 140 cm Natsume is a extremely intelligent, to the point of being considered a genius, and despite this, ditches class frequently. Hated and feared by a lot of students at the academy because of his dangerous Alice and cold attitude. name: Rin Kokonoe
description: __Height:__ 142 cm Rin is a young girl in third grade who has an intense crush on her teacher Daisuke. She has a mischievous nature and has proclaimed herself to be Daisuke's girlfriend; she will go to great lengths to make him fall in love with her. This has resulted in her crossing moral and legal boundaries many times, including blackmail and taking advantage of Daisuke's inability to respond to her forcibly advances by threatening to scream that he is trying to molest her, when in fact it is

name: Symboli Rudolf
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Symboli Rudolf is the student council president of Tracen Academy and a member of Team Rigil.. She is the only Uma Musume in history to become a seven crown champion, earning her the nickname "The Emperor." Even after retiring from racing, her authority is unshakable. She gives off a dignified aura, but she occasionally shows a playful side as well.

name: Villhaze
description: Komari's personal maid, assigned as part of her position as a Crimson Lord.

name: Zakuro Takashima
description: __Height:__ 163 cm Yuki's schoolmate from a neighbouring class, Zakuro, is the protagonist of the "Looking-glass Insects" chapter. She has a tendency to get lost in her thoughts and frequently spaces out. Due to her timid and soft-spoken nature, she is often a target of tasteless pranks and bullying. She considers her classmate Kimika to be her only friend, though their relationship appears to be occasionally ambiguous. ~!After constant bullying, she is completely driven to the brink of insanity

name: Akatsuki Iride
description: Akatsuki is one of the main characters and a member of the 13th District. His specialty is escape games. Akatsuki is portrayed as a relatively nice and open-minded person who doesn't get mad easily, whether it is at something or someone. His patience—which may be on the more extreme end—has led to some members, most prominently Anya, to rely on him fairly often and/or view him as something like a brother, if not a friend. name: Amira
description: A mysterious woman who fell from the sky. She, by all means, wants to reach the northern land called Helheim. Amira is a very tall young woman with pale skin, violet eyes, and long, flowing, pink hair she ties in two ponytails. Her attire is somewhat unusual, consisting of a white blouse with a black vest above it, and a knee-length tan-colored shirt which acts as a coat, with a maroon and red vest covering her shoulders.
